video.title: Buying Real Estate in Colombia is a Game-Changer
video.description:
🏡 Buy real estate in Medellin with Andrew: https://www.medellinlivingrealestate.com/buy 
📞 Book Our AirBnBs: 
Barrio Manila: https://airbnb.com/h/terra-202, https://airbnb.com/h/balance401, 
Provenza: https://airbnb.com/h/luxuryapartment4-bedroominprovenza
Las Palmas: https://airbnb.com/h/primaveracountrylife

In this video, I break down why Medellín is a smarter investment for men over 40 compared to the US. Real estate in Medellín offers huge returns — I’m talking 25% ROI, lower property prices, and the ability to rent out your place for great income.

I also dive into the pros and cons of buying here, from high rental demand in key neighborhoods to the challenges like lack of an MLS system and language barriers. Whether you’re looking for a vacation home or a place to retire, Medellín offers more bang for your buck compared to the US market.

#medellinrealestate  #investincolombia  #propertyinvestment  #realestateroi  #BuyInMedellin #expatlife  #medellinliving  #realestatecolombia  #investinmedellin  #realestatetips  #MedellinInvesting

video.title: Step-by-Step Process of Buying Real Estate In Medellin #medellin #colombia #realestate
video.description:
📸 Insta: https://www.instagram.com/andrewmacia/
👉 Want help buying property in Medellin? https://www.medellinlivingrealestate.com/buy
💻 Relocate to Medellin FREE Webinar: https://www.medellinmasterclass.com/registerwebinar
👕 Medellin Buzz T-Shirt: https://www.bonfire.com/the-logo-31-1-1/
☎ Book a Medellin Living Consultation with Andrew: https://tinyurl.com/8pcmccs5
📞 Join my free ZOOM call: https://forms.gle/ciHGpFnNonLRLi8r5

I've gone through the buying process five times here. In this video, I explain the four steps to buying real estate in Medellin, Colombia.

In this YouTube video, I discuss the process of buying real estate in Medellin, Colombia. I emphasize on having sufficient funds for a cash purchase, as securing a loan as a foreigner can be challenging due to credit requirements. I advise finding a reputable local attorney through expat groups or referrals. Discovering properties involves working with real estate agents or exploring neighborhoods independently. Negotiating a deal and conducting a thorough title analysis with the attorney's help are crucial. The purchase agreement solidifies the transaction, with payment typically following its signing. Money transfer options include using a local bank account or a brokerage firm. Registering the investment with the National Bank is emphasized. Finally, the deed is signed at a notary, leading to property ownership. The process's specifics may vary, but these steps outline a typical property purchase in Colombia.

Highlights
💰 Cash is essential for property purchase due to loan challenges for foreigners.
👥 Finding a trustworthy local attorney is crucial; expat groups and referrals are recommended.
🏢 Exploring neighborhoods independently and vetting real estate agents are ways to find properties.
💬 Negotiation precedes a thorough title analysis, revealing property issues that can be resolved.
📝 The purchase agreement finalizes the deal, often with an initial deposit payment.
💸 Money transfer options include a local bank account or a brokerage firm.
📝 Registering the investment with the National Bank is stressed for security.
🏦 The deed is signed at a notary, accompanied by closing costs.
🧩 Clean title and proper registration with the National Bank are emphasized for a successful purchase.

#expatlife #realestate #colombia

video.title: Recorremos la mansión más lujosa de Medellín
video.description:
Hoy estamos en una de las casas más impresionantes que he visto en Medellín.

Está a solo 5 minutos del Centro Comercial El Tesoro, pero al llegar parece que te desconectaras por completo de la ciudad.
Tiene una vista increíble, terrazas enormes para disfrutar el atardecer, un gimnasio privado y unos acabados de lujo exquisitos.
Y lo mejor: hay un espacio listo para construir una cabaña con piscina infinita.

Una de esas casas que te hacen pensar: “así quiero vivir algún día”.

Área Lote: 2.350m2
Área Construida: 1.200m2

4 habitaciones
2 habitaciones de servicio 
Gimnasio
Estudio
Acabados y muebles de lujo
Posibilidad de adecuar una piscina/jacuzzi

Valor de venta sin muebles: $15.000M
Valor de venta con muebles: $17.500M

Si estás interesado en visitar esta propiedad, puedes dejar tus datos en este siguiente formulario: https://form.jotform.com/220034506175648

Si quieres VENDER 
o ARRENDAR tu propiedad en Colombia, puedes contactarme aqui:
https://form.jotform.com/220043509238651

- Encuentra las mejores propiedades de Colombia aquí:
https://dluxe.com.co/inmuebles/

- Visitame en mi Instagram donde cada semana subo contenido exclusivo sobre las mejores propiedades y oportunidades del pais: https://www.instagram.com/flomeliz

- Visitame en mi Tiktok aqui:
https://www.tiktok.com/@flomeliz

¡Quédate pendiente al próximo video!

video.title: Touring a $500,000 Penthouse in Medellin, Colombia
video.description:
⬇️ Need Help Buying an Apartment in Medellin? 
https://www.medellinmasterclass.com/realestateinvest

More info here: https://nomadbarrio.com/for-sale/3-bed-apartment-in-el-poblado-spectacular-views--lalinde-1794

This stunning 152 m2, 3 bedroom, 4.5 bath turnkey Medellin penthouse has been tastefully decorated. Its furniture imported from Europe, the walls are adorned with art from local galleries highlighting Colombian artists. 

Each bedroom has its own ensuite bathroom and ample closet space, one with a dedicated workspace. 

This property offers breathtaking views of the best the city has to offer from its spacious balcony. Located in Lalinde, the city’s best restaurants, bars, cubs and shopping are all at your fingertips.  The kitchen is outfitted with everything you’ll need. 

There is a Sonos® sound system throughout, where you’ll control everything from your smartphone while listening to your favorite streaming apps. 

Building amenities include 24-hour security, a semi-Olympic (25 m) infinity pool, gym, sauna, steam room and a Roman bath. Two covered, dedicated parking spaces and a secure storage room are included. 

***

We specialize in exclusive apartment and home tours, showcasing the best properties Medellin has to offer. Whether you’re looking to buy your first home, invest in a luxury apartment, or simply explore the beautiful real estate opportunities in this vibrant city, you’ve come to the right place.

Join us as we:
🏡 Explore stunning homes and apartments
🔑 Provide expert insights and tips for buyers
📍 Highlight the best neighborhoods in Medellin

Our goal is to make your home-buying journey as smooth and enjoyable as possible. Subscribe now and let’s find your perfect home together!

#realestate #medellin #medellinrealestate #colombiarealestate #colombia #investing #apartment

comments.textDisplay:
⬇ Need Help Buying an Apartment in Medellin? 
https://www.medellinmasterclass.com/realestateinvest
Ah...Edificio Art living!  My home!  I love it here.  What a great price for the Penthouse.
Medellin real estate is near peaking.
thats a great location for some one that wants to be steps away from all the action... and that view is amazing
The price listed is usd?

It's not a penthouse it's an apartment... My property has the rooftop which is technically a penthouse it's a decent place and you did a nice job on the video but stop calling everything penthouses for God sakes 😂
UPDATE: This sold for US $440,000.

We were looking at buying a view apartment in an ‘iconic’ building in Medellin. Talked with an insurance company as the surrounding land was very steep. They sent us on to a geologist who agreed it was a great view, but constructing in that part of Poblado was at best questionable. These building are often now showing issues (know of one where holes are appearing in the car parking decks) so locals brush over the cracks and look for a gringo to sell it to.
Top luxury and no kitchen hood! 😂 Got your whole apartment smelling like chicken everyday
Art living sucks. The place next door Parma much better
Love it, the design and layout is perfect, it has potential

What is going to happen when the cartel shows up?
Outstanding place!!
Love the appartment... Only it is way too expensive for 153sqm albeit I do understand the higher quality compared to other appartments in Colombia.
Can the balcony support a 4 or 5 person hot tub?

Markets are really having issues, China has negative M1, the U.S. is having it's own deflation, and the world will follow. Hopefully you can offload this property before the price cuts in half. I'm a buyer around $250K-$300K.
That view is amazing.
This should not be close to 500k, this is closer to 300/350. Paying 500k should get you slightly north of 200m2 for sure!
The suite is worth the money. The views are priceless.

very nice place and for that amount of money i think its realy good deal

video.description:

Try reselling that old condo. Locals don’t want them. New builds have a huge premium. On HOA fees $159 sounds cheap until you take into account that the average salary in Colombia is $1,000 a month. As for refurbishing old properties the materials used are often cheap. Your new kitchen will look good for a year. Maids rooms?very few people have maids anymore. The cost, particular the mandatory health care costs and other rules, has killed live in maids off.

Nice properties!  Medellin is a great city.  Just think, those prices are I always thought the netting outside of the windows or on the balconies were to keep birds from flying in rather than kids or animals from jumping out. Did any of the buildings offer amenities like a gym, pool, etc?  Oh, and speaking of strange (or not so strange, lol) fetishes, I LOVE tankless water heaters!  We have one in our apartment now and I don't think I could ever go back to a hot water heater tank again.  I love not having to worry about running out of hot water ☺

Stay away from our country please,  people from our country cannot afford anymore their house. 43% of workers don't earn more than the minimum wage (220 eur/month) and in some neighborhoods rents have been multiplied by 4 caused of foreigners renting appartments in Medellín. I'd be loathe to purchase a depreciating asset like a house abroad.  You really don't know about how the government policies will shift.  Or regimes may change.  I'd rather park my assets in something more liquid.  Plus, real estate in developing countries quickly gets run down and outmoded.  I'd rather pay a premium for a nice place.  Commit to a year or so.  And then just skedaddle when the vibe begins to suck.

Colombia does not have any tax treaty with the US. Residing in Colombia for longer than 180 days will subject you to Colombia taxation. There can be some off sets for taxes paid in the US, however you are in a uphill battle. All of your SS income is considered taxable in Colombia if your total income is above certain levels, so get qualified tax planning if you don't want to be shocked by dual tax burdens.

video.title: $250K USD Apartment For Sale in Laureles
video.description:
Ready to buy in Medellin? 👉 Fill out our form at: https://www.medellinlivingrealestate.com/buy

If you’ve been looking for a modern, move-in-ready apartment in one of Medellín’s most walkable and desirable neighborhoods, this one in Laureles is a must-see.

✅ Size: 149.95 m² (~1,614 ft²)
✅ Bedrooms: 3
✅ Bathrooms: 2 Full + 1 Guest
✅ Renovation: Fully rebuilt in 2023 (new electrical, gas, and plumbing systems)
✅ Parking: Covered
✅ Layout: Bright, airy, and open
✅ Orientation: No poniente (no harsh afternoon sun)
✅ Building: 4-story, quiet ownership community
✅ Location: Steps from UPB, Metro Estadio, and Carrera 70

💰 Price: COP 950,000,000 (~USD $251,276)
💰 HOA: COP 150,000/month (~USD $40)

This ground-floor unit was completely remodeled from the ground up, combining modern design with practical comfort. It’s ideal for long-term living or as a secure rental property in one of Medellín’s most stable, family-friendly areas.

About Laureles:
Laureles is consistently rated as one of the top neighborhoods for expats in Medellín thanks to its safety, tree-lined streets, restaurants, cafés, and walkability.

Contact Medellín Living Real Estate
Interested in this property or others like it?

video.title: 🏡 ¿Cuánto cuesta realmente comprar vivienda en Medellín?
video.description:
En este video te mostramos los precios actuales de apartamentos en distintos sectores de la ciudad, algunas opciones con variaciones de espacios entre ellas.

Junto a la Agencia Inmobiliaria MaxiBienes, visitamos 3 propiedades en diferentes estratos y ubicaciones para que tengas una visión clara de lo que implica invertir en Medellín, ya sea que busques vivir aquí, retirarte o simplemente invertir en el mercado inmobiliario Colombiano.

✨ Descubrirás:

Precios reales de la vivienda en Medellín

Diferencias entre zonas y estratos

Aspectos legales que debes tener en cuenta si eres extranjero o inversionista

👉 Déjanos en los comentarios qué tipo de vivienda te interesa más: ¿Económica, familiar o de lujo y qué te parecieron los precios? me encantará leer tu opinión y conversar en comentarios📩

Redes Sociales y contacto de Maxibienes: 
https://www.instagram.com/maxibienes/ 
WhatsApp Ventas: +57 (310) 4525348

📌 Suscríbete al canal y activa la campanita para más contenido sobre estilo de vida, inversión y oportunidades en Medellín 🔔

video.title: Buying Real Estate In Medellin: TOP 7 QUESTIONS
video.description:
👉 Looking to buy in Medellin? Contact us: https://www.medellinlivingrealestate.com/buy

In this video, Andrew Macia and AK Joel from Medellín Living Real Estate answer the top 7 questions about buying property in Medellín in 2025. From short-term rental saturation to realistic ROI and property prices, we break down what you need to know before investing in real estate here. We also explore some hidden gems for sale, what to expect for your budget, and how remodeling costs have skyrocketed. If you're looking to buy property in Medellín or just want to know what it's really like, this video gives you the inside scoop.

Top Topics Covered:

Short-term rental saturation & zoning issues 🏘️
ROI expectations for turnkey vs. renovation projects 💸
Real estate prices in El Poblado, Laureles, & beyond 🏙️
How to find hidden gem properties 🔍
Remodelling costs and how they impact ROI 🔨

Timestamps:
0:00 - Intro & Hook
1:00 - Short-term rental saturation in Medellín
2:00 - What ROI investors are getting today
3:30 - Turnkey property ROI
5:00 - Best properties on the market
6:00 - How to vet contractors
7:00 - Appreciation rates in El Poblado & Envigado
8:00 - Landlord insurance and asset protection
9:00 - Current property prices in Medellín
10:00 - Hidden gems & good deals

For more details, visit Medellín Living Real Estate

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
MEDELLÍN - LAS PALMAS

Extraordinaria Casa Ubicada en una de las Mejores y Mas Exclusivas Parcelaciones de Medellín.
- A pocos minutos del Aeropuerto Internacional José María Córdoba. 
- Una deliciosa temperatura promedio todo el año de 23° grados centigrados.
- 13.500 M2 de lote
- 1.800 M2 construidos.

- 11 baños

- Sauna
- Jacuzzi 
- Turco

- Bar 
- Billar Pool 
- 2 habitaciones para empleados
- 3 cuartos útiles

- Circuito cerrado de videovigilancia. 
- 2 Porterías (Una portería de la Parcelación con vigilancia 24 horas y otra portería privada solo para esta casa).

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

Hola, somos UrbanRaiz, y queremos compartir nuestra pasión contigo. Para nosotros, trabajar en bienes raíces es más que un negocio, es una forma de hacer realidad tus sueños y proyectos.
Desde el momento en que nos llamas, tu historia se convierte en la nuestra. Nos encanta escuchar tus necesidades y deseos, porque entendemos lo importante que es para ti y tu familia. Nos esforzamos al máximo para estar a tu lado durante todo el proceso. 

Desde las primeras visitas hasta la toma de decisiones, estamos aquí para brindarte nuestra experiencia y consejos. 

Y no te preocupes por los detalles legales, estamos listos para eso también. Te apoyamos en cada paso, desde la documentación hasta encontrar el lugar perfecto para que puedas vivir tus sueños

SI QUIERES COMPRAR
Si buscas comprar, somos tu mejor aliado. Te ayudamos a encontrar la propiedad perfecta que se ajuste a tu presupuesto, necesidades y deseos. Además, te asesoramos en asuntos legales y financieros.

SI QUIERES VENDER
Si lo que deseas es vender, nos esforzamos en conocer cada detalle de tu propiedad. Mostramos sus características más valiosas con medios audiovisuales de alta calidad para atraer al prospecto ideal.

UrbanRaiz es más que una empresa de bienes raíces, somos tu equipo, tu apoyo y tu aliado en el mundo de los bienes raíces. Aquí, tus proyectos de vida se convierten en una realidad emocionante. UrbanRaiz, experiencia y compromiso en cada paso. Contáctanos hoy mismo y descubre cómo podemos hacer realidad tus sueños en bienes raíces
